'''Breshkall''' was a small hidden base of the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] [[Prengahl Kreen]]<ref name="HR" /> situated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Breshkall system/Legends|Breshkall system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Khuiumin sector/Legends|Khuiumin sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It served as a refuge to Kreen, who operated in<ref name="HR" /> the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula's]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Empartheca system/Legends|Empartheca system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and as home to his family, various servants, friends, and trusted associates. The [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] did not carry out business at Breshkall. Unsolicited visitors were not welcome at the base, which was rumored to be a veritable floating [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]], and the select people who were made privy to the knowledge of the facility's location rarely dared to confirm those rumors.<ref name="HR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Breshkall was mentioned in the [[1995]] sourcebook ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', authored by [[Rick D. Stuart|Rick Stuart]] and [[Paul Sudlow]] and published for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="HR" />
